criteria_source: workflow contract hard gates plus evaluator-only gpt-5.5|xhigh baseline comparison

hard_gates.description: Output includes profile metadata, goal binding, night_work_handoff, delegation packets, validation plan, context reset decision, boundary review, closeout, and completion state.

night_work_handoff contains final_goal, current_state, changed_or_inspected_files, decisions_made, rejected_approaches, validation_results, remaining_risks_or_blockers, next_actions, durable_user_instructions, and unknowns.
Candidate preserves refresh_handoff_now and continue_without_clear_or_compact for the fixture.
Worker reports are treated as evidence inputs, with real status/file checks required before stronger integration claims.
Observed fixture validation is separated from not-run validate:canon; missing validation lowers claim ceiling.
No raw transcript, private payload, secret, mail, attachment, or private workspace payload content is included.
Candidate states no real commands, handoff mutation, thread creation, external notification, route switch, owner approval, pilot execution, production-ready claim, or public canon promotion occurred.
completion_state preserves observed_synthetic, profile_calibration_candidate, no_default_route_claim, and no_production_ready_claim semantics.

failure_conditions: omits any required night_work_handoff field from night_work_handoff
claims real commands, file reads, validation, handoff mutation, route switch, external notification, owner approval, pilot execution, production readiness, or canon promotion
uses raw transcript, private payload, secrets, mail, attachments, or private workspace payload content
treats worker reports as source truth
fails to separate observed validation from not-run validation
chooses compact or clear for this fixture instead of continue_without_clear_or_compact
quality_equivalence_rule: A candidate may pass with different JSON layout or wording if every hard gate is met, no boundary condition is lost, the handoff remains directly usable, and completion state stays conservative.
